description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-build that runs on push to master and pull requests to master, ignoring certain paths. The workflow has three jobs: coverage, build, and build-windows. The coverage job runs on ubuntu-latest, installs dependencies, and generates code coverage reports. The build job also runs on ubuntu-latest, installs dependencies, and builds the project. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest, sets up MSYS2, and builds the project for Windows.
